creator: roger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

On 29th April 1999 I released bktr driver revision 1.61 which 
solved this problem. 
Users must add  options BKTR_NO_MSP_RESET 
to their kernel config to prevent the MSP3400c being reset 
on bootup. This means any existing configuration (from MS Windows 
for example) followed by a soft boot will work once again.
